steps.title: Identify the useful interior angle
steps.content: Line $c$ crosses parallel lines $s$ and $t$. The angle vertical to the marked $x^{\circ}$ angle is inside the parallel lines and is on the same side of the transversal as the $110^{\circ}$ angle.

steps.title: Use same-side interior and vertical angles
steps.content: Same-side interior angles formed by a transversal of parallel lines are supplementary, so the angle vertical to $x^{\circ}$ has measure $$180^{\circ}-110^{\circ}=70^{\circ}.$$ Vertical angles are congruent, so $x=70$.
